description: Multi-project labeled Sybil dataset. Sybils are contiguous members of connected clusters from PUBLIC per-report sources across independent projects (Hop, Safe, Arbitrum); each has cluster_id + project + label_source. Humans are vetted-eligible/doxxed. Split is cluster-aware.
known_biases: Sybil clusters: 75 wallets / 15 clusters / 3 projects ({'hop': 35, 'safe': 35, 'arbitrum': 5}). Cluster edge-type differs by project (Hop=mutual transfers, Safe=shared funder/deployer, Arbitrum=mixed).
Arbitrum contributes only 1 usable cluster (thin); Hop and Safe dominate.
HUMAN class is still Hop-sourced (eligible list + 2 doxxed) — human-side project diversity is a limitation.
'human'=vetted-eligible is a proxy (passed a Sybil filter), not verified humanness.
